description: Notarize-only relay of an environment-protection approval or rejection as GitHub rendered it. This is the SoR-HELD gate mode for deployments: the human approved or rejected the held run inside GitHub (pending_deployments), GitHub recorded approver, state, and comment, and AGLedger notarizes that rendered decision into the same offline-verifiable chain as the change, the CI conclusion, and the outcome. AGLedger held no gate here and made no decision; do not model this record as an AGLedger Verdict. When the org wants AGLedger to HOLD the deploy decision, use deploy-authorization-v1 instead of this relay, one decision, one holder. Pure notarization: reaches terminal RECORDED in one round-trip.

repo.description: GitHub owner/name the held run belongs to.

runId.description: GitHub Actions workflow run id that was held by environment protection. The SoR-side pointer for re-checking the relay.

environment.description: Environment whose protection gate was decided.

approver.description: GitHub login that rendered the decision, as the SoR reports it.

comment.description: The approver's comment as recorded by the SoR, when present.

renderedAt.description: When the SoR recorded the decision.

headSha.description: The commit the held run would deploy, for chain binding.

changeRef.description: recordId of the change-authored-v1 that produced this deployable (chain lineage), when applicable.

ciRef.description: recordId of the ci-conclusion-v1 for this commit (chain lineage), when applicable.
